---
title: "Analyze_MOFA_factors"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-14"
params:
  outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/results/MOFA
  mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
  mofa_scores: Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/MOFA/All_Samples/SampleScores.csv
  factor_weights_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/MOFA/All_Samples/
  markers_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/Markers_files
  config_file: 'config.yml'
---

## Params
```{r}
print(params)
outdir <- params$outdir

# If outdir not exists set to current dir
if (!dir.exists(outdir)){
    outdir <- getwd()
}
```


## Libraries
```{r}
library(reshape2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(MOFA2)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)
```


## Read Multi-Omics data
```{r read_input_data, message=FALSE}
library(MultiAssayExperiment)
library(HDF5Array)

mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae')
```


## Read Sample Scores
```{r}
wide_df <- read.csv(params$mofa_scores)

## Phenotype (colData MAE)
#pheno_df <- as.data.frame(colData(mae))

## Add phenotype data
#wide_df <- cbind(wide_df, pheno_df)

scores_df <- reshape2::melt(wide_df)
```


## Plot bio rep number on MOFA scores
```{r}
scores_df <- scores_df %>%
  mutate(BioRep =  sub(".*_", "", sample))

scores_df$BioRep <- as.factor(scores_df$BioRep)
```

```{r}
mofa_factor <- 'Factor1'

df_factor <- scores_df[scores_df$variable == mofa_factor,]
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= BioRep, y=value, fill = BioRep)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 
ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor1_scores_BioRep.pdf'), ggp, width=4.5, height=3)
```


```{r, fig.width=10}
df_factor <- scores_df[scores_df$variable == mofa_factor,]
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= observation.unit.identifier.crispr, y=value, fill = observation.unit.identifier.crispr)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot'))
ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor1_scores_ObsUnit.pdf'), ggp, width=8, height=5)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= culturing.strategy, y=value, fill = culturing.strategy)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 
ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor1_scores_Culturing.pdf'), ggp, width=5, height=4)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= tissues.from.which.cells.were.derived, y=value, fill = tissues.from.which.cells.were.derived)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 
ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor1_scores_Tissue.pdf'), ggp, width=6, height=3)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= sampling.timestamp, y=value, fill = sampling.timestamp)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 

ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor1_scores_SamplingTimestampg.pdf'), ggp, width=7, height=5)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= phenotype, y=value, fill = phenotype)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 

ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor1_scores_Phenotype.pdf'), ggp, width=6, height=4)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= reprogramming.method, y=value, fill = reprogramming.method)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 

ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor1_scores_Reprogramming.pdf'), ggp, width=6, height=4)
```


```{r}
cor(as.numeric(wide_df$Factor1), as.numeric(wide_df$PassageNumber), method = "spearman")
cor(as.numeric(wide_df$Factor2), as.numeric(wide_df$PassageNumber), method = "spearman")
cor(as.numeric(wide_df$Factor3), as.numeric(wide_df$PassageNumber), method = "spearman")
cor(as.numeric(wide_df$Factor4), as.numeric(wide_df$PassageNumber), method = "spearman")
cor(as.numeric(wide_df$Factor5), as.numeric(wide_df$PassageNumber), method = "spearman")
cor(as.numeric(wide_df$Factor6), as.numeric(wide_df$PassageNumber), method = "spearman")
```

## Feature weights
```{r}
markers_df <- read.csv(file.path(params$markers_dir, 'Transporters.csv'))

factor_weights_proteomics <- read.csv(file.path(params$factor_weights_dir, "factorweights_Proteomics.csv"), row.names=1)
factor_weights_proteomics$UniProt <- factor_weights_proteomics$feature

## Add rank columns
factor_weights <- factor_weights_proteomics[order(factor_weights_proteomics$Factor1, decreasing = T),]
factor_weights$Rank <- seq(1, nrow(factor_weights))

df_mapped <- factor_weights %>%
  left_join(markers_df, by = "UniProt")

ggp <- ggplot(df_mapped, aes(x=Rank, y=Factor1)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = Gene_symbol), 
                  na.rm = TRUE, 
                  size = 5,
                  box.padding = 1.0,
                  point.padding =0.5,
                  force = 8,
                  nudge_x = 0.2,
                  nudge_y = 0.2,
                  segment.color = "blue",
                  segment.size = 0.5,
                  max.overlaps = Inf
                  ) +
  ggtitle('Proteomics loadings on factor 1') +
  theme_bw()

ggp

ggsave(file.path(outdir,  'Prot_Weights_Factor1.pdf'), ggp, height=3.4, width = 5.5)
```


Metaboomics LUMC, glutamine and doxycycline
```{r}
markers_df <- read.csv(file.path(params$markers_dir, 'MetabolomicsLUMC_ManAnnotations.csv'))

factor_weights <- read.csv(file.path(params$factor_weights_dir, "factorweights_Metabolomics__LUMC___total_area_normalized.csv"), row.names=1)
## Add rank columns
factor_weights <- factor_weights[order(factor_weights$Factor1, decreasing = T),]
factor_weights$Rank <- seq(1, nrow(factor_weights))
factor_weights$Feature_ID <- rownames(factor_weights)

df_mapped <- factor_weights %>%
  left_join(markers_df, by = "Feature_ID")

ggp <- ggplot(df_mapped, aes(x=Rank, y=Factor1)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = Label ), 
                  na.rm = TRUE, 
                  size = 5,
                  box.padding = 1.0,
                  point.padding =0.5,
                  force = 8,
                  nudge_x = 0.5,
                  nudge_y = 0.1,
                  segment.color = "blue",
                  segment.size = 0.5,
                  max.overlaps = Inf
                  ) +
  ggtitle('Medium components on factor 1') +
  theme_bw()

ggp

ggsave(file.path(outdir,  'Mtblmcs_Weights_Factor1.pdf'), ggp, height=3.4, width = 5.5)
```


## Same plots for Factor 2


* Ranks of neuronal markers genes

RNAseq
```{r}
markers_df <- read.csv(file.path(params$markers_dir, 'Neuron_markers.csv'))
markers_df <- markers_df[markers_df$Stage != 'Ipsc',]

factor_weights <- read.csv(file.path(params$factor_weights_dir, "factorweights_RNAseq___RTC.csv"), row.names=1)
factor_weights$Ensembl <- factor_weights$feature
factor_weights$X <- NULL
factor_weights$Gene_symbol <- NULL


## Add rank columns
factor_weights <- factor_weights[order(factor_weights$Factor2, decreasing = T),]
factor_weights$Rank <- seq(1, nrow(factor_weights))


df_mapped <- factor_weights %>%
  left_join(markers_df, by = "Ensembl")

ggp <- ggplot(df_mapped, aes(x=Rank, y=Factor2)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = Gene_symbol), 
                  na.rm = TRUE, 
                  size = 5,
                  box.padding = 1.0,
                  point.padding =0.5,
                  force = 8,
                  nudge_x = 0.2,
                  nudge_y = 0.2,
                  segment.color = "blue",
                  segment.size = 0.5,
                  max.overlaps = Inf
                  ) +
  ggtitle('MOFA Factor 2 RNAseq feature ranks') +
  theme_bw()

ggp

ggsave(file.path(outdir,  'RNAseq_Weights_Factor2.pdf'), ggp, height=3.5, width = 5.5)
```

Proteomics
```{r}
neuron_markers_prot <- c(
'Q9H2A3',  #'NEUROG2' 
'P11137', #'MAP2'
'Q13509' #Beta III tubulin'
)


## Add rank columns
factor_weights_proteomics <- factor_weights_proteomics[order(factor_weights_proteomics$Factor2, decreasing = T),]
factor_weights_proteomics$Rank <- seq(1, nrow(factor_weights_proteomics))


factor_weights_proteomics[neuron_markers_prot, ]

factor_weights_proteomics$label <- ifelse(factor_weights_proteomics$gene_id %in% c(
    'NEUROG2',
    'MAP2', 
    'TUBB3',
    'NEFL',
    'NEFM',
    'SYP',
    'SYN1'
), factor_weights_proteomics$gene_id, NA)

ggp <- ggplot(factor_weights_proteomics, aes(x=Rank, y=Factor2)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = label), 
                  na.rm = TRUE, 
                  size = 5.5,
                  box.padding = 1.0,
                  point.padding =0.5,
                  force = 8,
                  nudge_x = 0.2,
                  nudge_y = 0.2,
                  segment.color = "blue",
                  segment.size = 0.5,
                  max.overlaps = Inf
                  ) +
  ggtitle('MOFA Factor 2 Proteomics feature ranks') +
  theme_bw()

ggp
ggsave(file.path(outdir,  'Prot_Weights_Factor2.pdf'), ggp, height = 3.4, width = 5.5)
```





```{r}
mofa_factor <- 'Factor2'

df_factor <- scores_df[scores_df$variable == mofa_factor,]
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= BioRep, y=value, fill = BioRep)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 
ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor2_scores_BioRep.pdf'), ggp, width=4.5, height=3)
```


```{r, fig.width=10}
df_factor <- scores_df[scores_df$variable == mofa_factor,]
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= observation.unit.identifier.crispr, y=value, fill = observation.unit.identifier.crispr)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot'))
ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor2_scores_ObsUnit.pdf'), ggp, width=8, height=5)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= culturing.strategy, y=value, fill = culturing.strategy)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 
ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor2_scores_Culturing.pdf'), ggp, width=5, height=4)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= tissues.from.which.cells.were.derived, y=value, fill = tissues.from.which.cells.were.derived)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 
ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor2_scores_Tissue.pdf'), ggp, width=6, height=3)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= sampling.timestamp, y=value, fill = sampling.timestamp)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 

ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor2_scores_SamplingTimestampg.pdf'), ggp, width=7, height=5)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= phenotype, y=value, fill = phenotype)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 

ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor2_scores_Phenotype.pdf'), ggp, width=6, height=4)
```


```{r}
ggp <- ggplot(df_factor, aes(x= reprogramming.method, y=value, fill = reprogramming.method)) + 
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha =0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width =0.15, size =2, alpha =0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "kruskal.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = 'Phenotype group', y = "MOFA scores", title = paste0(mofa_factor, ' scores boxplot')) 

ggsave(file.path(outdir, 'Factor2_scores_Reprogramming.pdf'), ggp, width=6, height=4)
```
